layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content regions spanning the full slide body. The slide follows a top-to-bottom hierarchy: title banner at top (15% height), two equal-peer columns below (split 1:1, each 45% width with 2% gutter between), and a full-width key takeaway banner at bottom (6% height). All containers respect 3% safe-area margins. The layout emphasizes parallel comparison between Manufacturing KPCs (left) and J&J core capabilities (right), with visual symmetry reinforcing the balanced argument structure. No decorative bottom layer is needed as content fills the slide effectively. Reading flow is top-to-bottom, then left-to-right within the body zone.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 4
  Allocation: [0.15, 0.45, 0.45, 0.06]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Manufacturing KPCs): Left column occupying 45% of slide width, positioned from left edge of safe area. Contains heading 'Manufacturing KPCs' followed by three numbered sections (1, 2, 3) with bold headings and body text. Each section is vertically stacked with consistent spacing. Numbers are styled as large bold numerals in brand accent color. Section headings ('Game quality', 'Proven performance', 'Incumbent advantage') use heading font in primary color. Body text uses body font in text color, left-aligned, with comfortable line spacing. Light grey background fill (light grey alt role) provides subtle container definition. Top edge aligns exactly with RIGHT COLUMN top edge. Bottom edge aligns exactly with RIGHT COLUMN bottom edge. Proportional weight: equal-peers with RIGHT COLUMN.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — J&J Core Capabilities): Right column occupying 45% of slide width, positioned from 2% gutter after LEFT COLUMN to right edge of safe area. Contains heading 'J&J core capabilities' followed by six bullet points organized in three logical groups (two bullets per capability theme). Heading uses heading font in primary color. Bullet points use body font in text color, left-aligned, with bullet markers in brand accent color. Content is vertically distributed with equal spacing between bullet groups to match the three-section rhythm of LEFT COLUMN. Light grey background fill (light grey alt role) provides subtle container definition, matching LEFT COLUMN treatment. Top edge aligns exactly with LEFT COLUMN top edge. Bottom edge aligns exactly with LEFT COLUMN bottom edge. Proportional weight: equal-peers with LEFT COLUMN. Font size target: same as LEFT COLUMN body text to maintain within-slide uniformity.
  C2 (BOTTOM BANNER — Key Takeaway): Full-width banner spanning 94% of slide width (respecting 3% margins on each side), positioned at bottom of slide with 6% height. Contains italic label 'Key takeaway:' followed by summary sentence. Background fill uses brand accent color to create visual separation from body content above. Text uses body font in primary color for high contrast against accent background. Content is center-aligned vertically within the banner and left-aligned horizontally. This container anchors the slide's conclusion and provides clear visual closure. Top edge sits 2% below the bottom edge of the two columns above.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE LAYER — Inactive): Inactive. The slide content fills the available space effectively with the two equal columns and bottom banner. No additional decorative background layer is needed. The light grey fills on C0 and C1 provide sufficient visual grouping.
  SC-TOP (CONNECTOR LAYER — Inactive): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are needed. The parallel column structure is self-evident and does not require visual linking elements.
